name: Pirelli Weekly Audit

on:
  schedule:
    - cron: '0 6 * * 1'
  workflow_dispatch:

jobs:
  audit:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    timeout-minutes: 90

    steps:
      - name: Checkout
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Restore audit history cache
        uses: actions/cache@v4
        with:
          path: outputs/audit_history_v4.db
          key: audit-history-v4-${{ github.run_id }}
          restore-keys: |
            audit-history-v4-

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: '3.11'

      - name: Install deps
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt
          python -m playwright install --with-deps chromium

      - name: Run script
        env:
          PIRELLI_MAX_PAGES_PER_SITE: '220'
          PIRELLI_MAX_CRAWL_DEPTH: '5'
        run: python main.py --config config/sites.yaml --db outputs/audit_history_v4.db --output-dir outputs

      - name: Upload output
        uses: actions/upload-artifact@v4
        with:
          name: audit-output
          path: outputs/
